message:
fix(codegen): Fix optional params and Python or/and semantics

- Add pyOr/pyAnd runtime helpers for Python boolean operator semantics
  with incompatible types (returns value, not bool)
- Fix method param mutable copy generation to detect None defaults and
  use explicit type annotation with default value type
- Update logical.zig to use pyOr/pyAnd for incompatible type pairs
  instead of falling back to bool-returning version

This fixes issues where:
- `scopes = scopes or ["module", ...]` now returns the list, not bool
- Parameters with `=None` default that are reassigned don't cause
  @TypeOf(null) compile errors
